transcript: I'm on a diet, let's go to Subway for lunch. Yeah, let me get a six inch turkey on wheat, double meat, no cheese, all the veggies, mustard, and a large Coke Zero. Wait, and you actually are losing weight eating like that? Yeah, I'm actually down 20 pounds and I still eat out occasionally. Nice, who taught you how to do that? My coach Seth G taught me everything he knows about fat loss. I'm gonna make sure to follow Seth G right now.
caption:
Comment “FASTFOOD” for my fast food cheat sheet 🙌🏼

Try this order from Subway 👇🏼

6-inch turkey on wheat, double meat, no cheese, all the veggies, mustard, and a Diet Coke 
(400 calories 39 G protein)

This meal will save you over 1000 calories 👀 & keep you on track with your fitness journey 

Send this to a friend that needs help 🙌🏼

Follow @sethgolie for fast food swaps 🔥
ocr_text: SUBWAY 1580 CALORIES 45 G PROTEIN / 400 CALORIES 39 G PROTEIN
visual_scenes: Two shirtless men stand in front of a Subway logo holding plates with sandwiches and drinks, displaying calorie and protein information. Polished edit.
creator: @sethgolie

parsed.original_meal: Regular Subway order (footlong with cheese, mayo, regular Coke)
parsed.swap_meal: 6-inch turkey on wheat, double meat, no cheese, all veggies, mustard + Diet Coke
parsed.notes: Saves over 1000 calories. Key swaps: 6-inch instead of footlong, no cheese, mustard instead of mayo.
